rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing study’s core method/problem: both are randomized field experiments on display advertising’s causal impact on site visitation, and the cited work specifically introduces treatment-control exposure methods to address targeting/browsing selection bias. The citing note says it extends field-experimental online advertising and highlights a measurement gap around unexposed users, which closely matches the cited paper’s stated contribution, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
